drive_dates: Next Week Company profile JobsUPI is India’s Digital Public Infrastructure (DPI) for jobs—a unified, open, and inclusive interface to connect every job seeker to every job creator. Just like UPI transformed payments, JobsUPI aims to transform hiring—making it real-time, hyperlocal, and equitable.
date_of_joining: 1 st Jan 2026 (leaves will be provided for examination)

package_salary.ppo_ctc: Stipend during 6 months Internship : 20 K per month Salary after 6 months Internship : CTC 6 LPA (5 LPA fixed + 1 lac variable)

selection_process_steps: b) Round 2: 6 hrs coding hackathon on a problem statement
